experience.target_role: Senior Frontend Developer / Frontend Software Engineer
experience.reason_for_leaving: My current contract role at JPMorgan Chase & Co. is wrapping up, so I'm actively looking and ready to start a new role right away.
experience.summary: Senior Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable applications with React and TypeScript, complemented by backend API development using Node.js and Express. Skilled in component-driven architectures, performance tuning, and accessible, cross-browser compliant interfaces. Proven ability to integrate RESTful and GraphQL services, implement CI/CD pipelines, and collaborate with cross-functional teams.

job_preferences.notes: Actively job-searching and very interested in moving forward. Open to contract, W2, C2C, and full-time frontend / software engineering roles. Flexible on work arrangement (remote, hybrid, or onsite) and willing to relocate anywhere in the US at my own expense. Can start as soon as possible.

work_history.title: Senior Frontend Developer
highlights: Architected and delivered a React + TypeScript dashboard integrating GraphQL APIs, reducing data-fetch latency by 50% and supporting real-time workflows for 200+ users.
Designed a component-driven frontend architecture with reusable UI patterns and optimized state management, accelerating feature delivery across multiple modules.
Built WCAG 2.1 AA-compliant, responsive UI components with Tailwind CSS and Context API.
Optimized performance via Next.js code splitting, lazy loading, and bundle optimization.
Led migration of legacy jQuery modules to React Hooks, reducing bug reports by 25% over 6 months.
Integrated RESTful APIs with robust async handling, error boundaries, and retry logic.
Ran collaborative Git/GitHub workflows (branching, pull requests, code reviews).

work_history.title: Frontend Developer
highlights: Built secure, high-performance transaction interfaces with React, Redux, and TypeScript, managing state for 10,000+ concurrent sessions in a fintech environment.
Optimized assets with SASS and Webpack, reducing CSS bundle size by ~33% with cross-browser (incl. IE11) support.
Refactored auth workflows with JWT and Axios interceptors, cutting API failure rates by 15%.
Built CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and Docker, automating regression testing with Jest and Selenium.

work_history.title: Frontend Developer
highlights: Built reusable React component libraries with Bootstrap, ensuring consistent UI/UX across 15+ pages.
Resolved cross-browser rendering issues using Chrome DevTools and responsive design.
Developed dynamic, data-driven forms with JavaScript and AJAX submitting to Node.js APIs.
Implemented unit/integration tests with Jest and React Testing Library, achieving 80%+ coverage.
Refactored legacy jQuery into modern ES6+ modular architecture within Agile/Scrum.
